reference: I have been having blood blisters pop up on my hands on occasion. They last only a few days, fade away, and appear more like liver spots, then disappear. There is no pain. I take various medications for fibromyalgia and have been having dental problems with implants that are not integrating properly. I have an artificial hip. Because of the dental problems and the onset of fibromyalgia after hip surgery, my oral surgeon had me tested for metal allergies. I am highly allergic to palladium, but not titanium, as he had feared.
text: I have been having blood blisters pop up on my hands on occasion. They last only a few days, fade away, and appear more like liver spots, then disappear. There is no pain. I take various medications for fibromyalgia and have been having dental problems with implants that are not interproperly. I have an artificial hip because of the dental problems and the onset of fibromyalgia after hip surgery. My oral surgeon had me tested for metal allergies. I am highly allergic to pallate, but not titanium, as he had feared.
